attempts.code_tried: ext x; simp only [ModuleCat.extendScalars, ModuleCat.extendRestrictScalarsAdj]; change (ModuleCat.ExtendRestrictScalarsAdj.counit (CommRingCat.Hom.hom ψ)).app _ _ = _

attempts.strategy: rewrite the counit + baseChange to isolate the bare inner value ρ(x)
attempts.insight: Counit.map_apply_one_tmul sends 1⊗ρ(x) ↦ 1•ρ(x)=ρ(x); LHS collapses to ρ(x), goal becomes ρ(x) = regroupEquiv.inv (1⊗x)

Both sides unwind to (1 : A⊗R')⊗ₜx — ρ via identity-on-carrier restrictScalarsComp'App bridges, regroupEquiv.inv via comm≫cancelBaseChange≫comm — so they are defeq; congrArg _ rfl closes. Axiom-clean.
